Summary: Login Screen - Login button activates without password entry
Description:
Steps to Reproduce:
1. Open Login screen.
2. Enter email only.
3. Leave password empty.
4. Observe button.
Expected Result: Button should require both email and password.
Actual Result: Button activated with only email entered.

Summary: Login Screen - Raw HTTP error shown instead of friendly no-internet message
Description:
Steps to Reproduce:
1. Enable airplane mode.
2. Enter credentials.
3. Tap Login.
4. Observe error.
Actual Result: Raw HTTP timeout code displayed to user.

Summary: Login Screen - Button radius and input border color mismatch with design
Description:
Steps to Reproduce:
1. Open Login.
2. Compare button corner radius and input border color with mockup.

Summary: Login Screen - Keyboard overlaps Login button on small screens
Description:
Steps to Reproduce:
1. Open Login on iPhone SE.
2. Tap email field.
3. Check button accessibility.
Expected Result: Screen should scroll to keep Login button accessible.
Actual Result: Keyboard covered button with no scroll.

Summary: Login Screen - Input fields slightly misaligned on certain Android OEM skins
Description:
Steps to Reproduce:
1. Open Login screen on Samsung Galaxy A52.
2. Observe input field alignment.
Expected Result: Input fields should be uniformly aligned on all Android devices.
Actual Result: Fields slightly left-shifted on Samsung One UI skin.
